flake

(flake 3') [...] cedar he has ... [...].

[...] mu-un-DU

flake 5'flake 5'

[...] u-me-ni-šub

(flake 5') After he has cast [...], [...] red wool, [...] then after he has prepared the ground, he has set up [...].

[...] TI id-di

[... siki]ḫe₂-me-da

flake 7'7'

[...] ud-ba ki u-me-ni-keš₂-da

flake 8'flake 8'

[...] bi₂-in-gin₆

[...] u₂-kin
flake 9'flake 9'

[...] igi bi₂-in-dul

[... ik]-tum₃

[...] RA ŋeš ba-an-ḫur

(flake 10') 10'. [...] was drawn.

flake 11'11'

[...] ⸢ba?⸣-an-šid

(flake 11') 11'. [...] was recited.

(flake 12') 12'. [...] ...
